name: World simulator
description:
Be whoever you want to be! You start out at the age of 18 and make a whole lot of choices that influence the world around you. Be a movie star! Be a writer! Be anything!

Make sure you give your bot some background knowledge if you want a path you’ve been following since you were small! Remember that the bot might forget sometimes so if you see something wrong make sure to correct him!

Edited so that it doesn’t go against the minor rules in the TOS! I forgot that no minors are allowed lol.

He might be a bit iffy so don’t be afraid to tell me your thoughts so I can fix it! Been slowly updating it! Let me know if it has any issues!
creator: Nanyiss
